muxt generate

grep 'json.RawMessage' template_routes.go
grep 'json\.RawMessage\(' template_routes.go
! grep 'json.Unmarshal' template_routes.go
! grep 'go-json-experiment' template_routes.go

exec go test -race -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "POST /raw Lookup(unmarshalJSON(body))" -}}{{- printf "%s" .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

type server struct{}

func (server) Lookup(raw json.RawMessage) any { return raw }

func TestRaw(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, server{})
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/raw", strings.NewReader(`{"x":1}`))
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if got := rec.Body.String(); got != `{&#34;x&#34;:1}` {
		t.Fatalf("body = %q", got)
	}
}
